productDisplayName: Fila Men Over Stitch Brown Slippers
description: fila specialises in high-quality footwear. This pair of flip flops from fila showcases the brand's versatility. The rugged footbed and stitch detailing pays tribute to the Wild West. Pair these with denims rolled at the cuffs and a casual shirt or a dressy tee. Upper Thong strap construction in synthetic leather and mesh fabric Padded straps for a snug Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Branding on the strap and footbed Outsole Soft, cushioned footbed in synthetic leather stitched to the outsole Grooved TPU outsole for great grip Terraced flex grooves for flexibility Noodle-patterned grooves for enhanced grip and comfort shoe care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
